title: Luffy Returns to the Final Fight
description: After Enel’s defeat, Skypiea begins to heal as enemies, allies, and the Straw Hats gather around the miracle of the bell.
scene: Across pages 0, 1, 2, 3, this scene focuses on Calgara, Luffy, Noland, Nami, Aisa. After Enel’s defeat, Skypiea begins to heal as enemies, allies, and the Straw Hats gather around the miracle of the bell.

dialogue.speaker: Calgara
dialogue.text: Would you like some delicious milk?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Can you hear it!? Mister Diamond Heaaaad!?

summary: After Enel’s defeat, Skypiea begins to heal as enemies, allies, and the Straw Hats gather around the miracle of the bell.
